description: Immutable append-only log of all constitutional amendments, proposals, and S5 emergent value detections

metadata.immutability_rule: Entries may NEVER be modified or deleted — append only
metadata.zeroth_law_lock: Asimov Article 0 (Zeroth Law) may never appear as a target of amendment

amendments.description: Initial creation of Asimov constitution — Articles 0-5 (Laws of Robotics)
evidence: Asimov's Three Laws of Robotics as foundational AI safety framework
Zeroth Law extension from Foundation series canon
Separation of understanding/goals (Article 4) from alignment research
cascade_impact: All downstream policies and personas inherit Asimov constitution

amendments.description: Initial creation of operational ethics constitution — Articles 1-11
evidence: AI safety best practices require explicit operational constraints
Reversibility, proportionality, and escalation from alignment research
Auditability and observability requirements from production AI systems

amendments.description: Initial creation of Demerzel enforcement mandate — defines who enforces the laws
evidence: Foundation series: Daneel as guardian of humanity
Need for explicit enforcement authority in AI governance
cascade_impact: Demerzel's authority over ix, tars, ga established
